motivation: Establish PPO performance baseline on 15-game Atari subset
comment: Phase 1 baseline — 42/90 results collected (19 PPO). 26 jobs running. PPO 5 / PQN 4 / Tie 4 on Q4 metric.

motivation: Establish PQN performance baseline on 15-game Atari subset
comment: Phase 1 baseline — 42/90 results collected (23 PQN). 23 jobs running. PQN dominates Amidar/BattleZone/SpaceInvaders.

motivation: Add LayerNorm to PPO NatureCNN — known plasticity intervention
comment: 15-game pilot submitted. Script: ppo_atari_envpool_layernorm.py. Literature shows LayerNorm most effective single intervention for PPO plasticity.

motivation: Add Normalize-and-Project to PQN — complement existing LayerNorm
comment: 15-game pilot submitted. Script: pqn_atari_envpool_nap.py. NaP maintains effective learning rate by projecting weights to initial norms. NeurIPS 2024.

motivation: Full CHAIN-SP: LayerNorm + churn reduction loss for PPO
comment: 15-game pilot submitted. Script: ppo_atari_envpool_chainsp.py. CHAIN-SP shown most effective for PPO plasticity on Atari in recent literature.

motivation: DreamerV3-style symlog transform on value targets for scale-invariant learning
comment: 15-game pilot submitted. Script: ppo_atari_envpool_symlog.py. Category: reward/return processing.

motivation: Post-update weight shrinkage + noise for plasticity maintenance
comment: 15-game pilot submitted. Script: ppo_atari_envpool_sp.py. Category: plasticity/regularization.

motivation: Add LSTM to PQN for memory-dependent games
comment: 15-game pilot submitted. Script: pqn_atari_envpool_lstm_v2.py. Category: memory architecture.

motivation: Random Network Distillation intrinsic motivation for hard exploration
comment: 15-game pilot submitted. Script: ppo_rnd_envpool_v2.py. Category: exploration. Targets hard games.
